commonAnnotations.summary: E2E execution QA of a hiring-coach run.
commonAnnotations.description: QA of hiring-coach run conversation_id fixture-conv-healthy (clip HIA-C1, variant mp-test). Call get_cef_guidance topic investigation_procedure. Verify the run's own activities completed via cef_agent_logs, then sweep the platform components (orchestrator/agent-runtime/ddc-s3-gateway) with cef_component_logs, scoped to this run's vault/agent and time window. Execution health only — do NOT assess scores.
